rulings.Case Title: JESSE TEPPER VS. AFREEN WAHAB et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 13, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANTS AFREEN WAHAB, LIAM WHELAN and SHEA WHELAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED with leave to amend to bring the action in the name of a proper Plaintiff. The Court takes Judicial Notice of the Grand Deed. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 101 CYRIL MAGNIN ST, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. HANA ZEN, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 13, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT HANA ZEN, INC's, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Overruled, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for commercial unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Defendant and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 845 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC VS. JASON SANDERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Discovery, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 13, 2014, Line 6: PLAINTIFF 845 CALIFORNIA STREET'S Motion To Compel Discovery and Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant: GRANTED subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete responses without objections to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories and Requests for Production by hand delivery to Plaintiff's counsel office within 2 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $630. (501/REQ)
